standup.summary: Day 13: PUBLISH_QUEUE fully cleared (265 pages live) — a major milestone; Sprint 58 ready to kick off with DeFiLlama Live API as lead item; 2 Jefe blockers still pending; 3 TS errors and API rate-limiting gap are today's technical priorities.

sections.title: Analytics — Site Status (Day 13)
items: 265 pages live — PUBLISH_QUEUE hit 0 yesterday for the first time; full site content is now indexed and crawlable
No Google Search Console signals yet — site is 13 days old; earliest organic impressions/clicks expected this week or next
Data pipeline healthy: CoinGecko /api/prices (60s TTL + fallback), /api/trending (300s TTL), DefiLlama /api/defi-yields (llama.fi confirmed)
Critical gap: rate limiting not applied to ANY of the 6 public API routes — risk of abuse and cost overrun as organic traffic grows
Fallback data coverage at 2/6 routes (prices + market-dominance only) — /api/trending, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics have no fallback
Build running with ignoreBuildErrors:true and 58 pre-existing TS errors (3 actionable: AICourseRecommendations.tsx + stargate/page.tsx) — no new errors introduced yesterday
Top expected organic performers once GSC data arrives: /tools/dca-calculator, /tools/portfolio-tracker, /learn/bitcoin-etf-guide, /compare/wallets/ledger-vs-trezor, /tools/gas-tracker

sections.title: Project Manager — Yesterday vs Today
items: Mar 14 SHIPPED: 2 learn guides published, 5 international pages (/es, /fr, /de, /pt-br, /ja — partial set), 2 OG images, 5 DailyChallenge UX/A11y patches
MILESTONE: PUBLISH_QUEUE fully cleared — 265 total pages live, 0 remaining in queue
Build: OOM in VM sandbox only (ignoreBuildErrors:true confirmed); not a production blocker — Vercel builds cleanly on cloud
58 pre-existing TS errors (0 new added); 3 are actionable today: AICourseRecommendations.tsx JSX syntax (17 errors) + /ecosystem/stargate/page.tsx unclosed <h1> (1 error)
BLOCKED — WalletConnect Prod Keys: ConnectWalletButton needs production Project ID from cloud.walletconnect.com (Jefe action)
BLOCKED — Playwright CI Runner: GitHub Actions secrets not yet configured (Jefe action — repo Settings → Actions)
Sprint 58 pipeline loaded with 6 items: dApp Guides 70–79, DeFiLlama Live API, Email Drip (Resend), Referral Backend + On-chain, 2 TBD
Carry-overs from Mar 14 EOD: add checkRateLimit to all 6 API routes, expand fallback data to 4 remaining routes, fix 3 TS errors, kick off Sprint 58

sections.title: CEO — Today's Top 3 Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1: Kick off Sprint 58 with DeFiLlama Live API — Bloomberg Screener V3 currently runs on mock data; replacing it with real TVL/APY/Volume from llama.fi is the single highest-credibility unlock this sprint. Real data = user trust = better SEO engagement signals. Delegate to: Data Engineer + Programmer.

PRIORITY 2: Clear the 2 Jefe blockers — both are ~15-minute tasks with outsized leverage. WalletConnect prod key unlocks real wallet connections for mainnet users (required for gamification + referral attribution). GitHub Actions secrets unblock automated QA before every deploy (prevents regressions). These blockers are Sprint 58 critical-path.

PRIORITY 3: Technical debt sprint — fix AICourseRecommendations.tsx JSX errors + stargate/page.tsx before Sprint 58 lands new code on top of broken TS; and add rate limiting (checkRateLimit) to all 6 API routes to protect the platform as organic traffic begins arriving. Delegate to: Programmer (TS fixes) + Data Engineer (rate limiting + fallback coverage).

publish.summary: Published 3 DeFi & emerging tech learn guides (Day 16 batch); publish queue is now empty; deploy requires manual Vercel redeploy.
publish.notes: Chrome extension was not connected — Vercel deploy could not be automated. To complete deployment, navigate to https://vercel.com/0x-machina/cryptodegen/deployments and click Redeploy on the current production deployment.

build.summary: Built 4 learn guides across 3 runs: stablecoin payments guide (3,200 words) covering GENIUS Act and cross-border transfers; Pendle Finance yield tokenization guide (16 min read) with interactive PT Fixed Yield Calculator; and quantum-resistant crypto + perpetual DEX guides (3,000 words and 3,200 words respectively) addressing trending security and $22.6B daily volume narratives. All pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE with full SEO, structured data, and internal linking.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: GENIUS Act signed July 18, 2025 — first US federal stablecoin law, requires 100% reserves and monthly attestations
Stablecoin market cap grew from $205B to ~$310B in 2025, projected to surpass $1T by late 2026
USDC processed ~$18.3T and USDT ~$13.3T in 2025; together = 93% of market
On-chain stablecoin tx volume hit $8.9T in H1 2025 alone; ~$390B in pure payment volume in 2025
Visa stablecoin settlement: $4.5B annualized run rate Jan 2026; remittances $19B annualized
No existing degen0x payments-specific guide — stablecoin-comparison covers types, payfi-guide covers DeFi yield, gap identified
Topic selected: Pendle Finance — yield tokenization protocol not yet covered on degen0x
Market position: ~$8.9B TVL, 58% on-chain yield trading market share (March 2026)
Key mechanism: SY wrapper splits yield-bearing assets into PT (fixed yield) + YT (yield speculation)
New product: Boros (V3) tokenizes perp funding rates — $5.5B early notional volume
January 2026 tokenomics overhaul: vePENDLE replaced by liquid sPENDLE (14-day unstaking)
Chains supported: Ethereum, Arbitrum, BSC, Base, Mantle
Annual revenue >$40M with 80% going to token buybacks
Key competing angle: no existing degen0x content on yield tokenization as a category

Identified quantum-resistant crypto as top trending 2026 narrative with zero existing degen0x coverage — $9B+ sector market cap, 25% of BTC ($718B) in vulnerable addresses, NIST PQC standards finalized Aug 2024
Identified perpetual DEX market gap — $22.6B daily volume, Hyperliquid at 80% market share ($18B+/day), no degen0x guide despite existing perp tools (funding rates, liquidation heatmap)
Sourced data from CoinGecko, DefiLlama, NIST, BeInCrypto, CoinGape, Chainalysis, Federal Reserve, CryptoTicker
Cross-referenced 65+ learn guides and 100+ tools to confirm no content overlap

sections.title: Content Created
items: 3,200-word learn guide: Stablecoin Payments Guide 2026: GENIUS Act, Cross-Border Transfers & On-Chain Finance

9 sections covering: types refresher, payment rails comparison, GENIUS Act deep-dive, major stablecoins (USDT/USDC/PYUSD/EURC), cross-border step-by-step, 6 use cases, institutional adoption (Visa/PayPal/JPMorgan/Stripe), risks (6 rated), FAQ (6 questions)
Comparison table: Traditional Wire vs USDC on Solana vs USDT on Tron
Real example: $50K invoice US→Brazil — $825 fees/3-4 days wire vs ~$25-50/<1 min stablecoin
3 internal links: /learn/stablecoin-comparison, /learn/payfi-guide, /tools/dca-calculator
16 min read comprehensive learn guide — 10 structured sections with ToC

Covers: What is Pendle, yield tokenization mechanics, PT vs YT comparison table, Pendle AMM, three core strategies, Boros V3, sPENDLE tokenomics, risk matrix, getting-started walkthrough, 6-question FAQ
Info boxes, comparison tables, and step-by-step flows throughout
5 internal links: /learn/liquid-staking-derivatives, /learn/advanced-defi-strategies, /tools/staking-apy, /tools/yield-farming-calculator, /learn/defi-safety-guide-2026
Disclaimer and risk section covering 5 distinct risk categories

Quantum-Resistant Crypto Guide (549 lines, ~3000 words, 14 min read) — ECDSA vulnerability, Shor's algorithm, Q-Day timeline (5-40 yrs), NIST standards (ML-KEM, ML-DSA, SLH-DSA, FN-DSA), 5 PQC projects (QRL, Abelian, QANplatform, Project 11, Zcash/Starknet), Bitcoin/Ethereum preparation status, 6 actionable protection steps, 6-question FAQ

Best Perpetual DEX Guide (534 lines, ~3200 words, 15 min read) — perp mechanics, $22.6B market overview, order book vs AMM deep-dive, top 5 platforms compared (Hyperliquid/dYdX/Lighter/GRVT/GMX), risk analysis (6 categories), 6-step getting started guide with checklist, 6-question FAQ

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Stablecoin guide — Title: 'Stablecoin Payments Guide 2026 — GENIUS Act & Cross-Border | degen0x' (59 chars)
Target keyword: 'stablecoin payments guide 2026'
Schemas added: Article (BlogPosting) + FAQPage (6 Q&A) via combineSchemas()
OpenGraph article type with publishedTime 2026-03-15T00:00:00Z
Canonical URL set, Twitter card configured
TypeScript: 0 errors on new file
Pendle guide — Title: 'Pendle Finance Guide 2026: Yield Tokenization | degen0x' (55 chars — primary keyword first)
Meta description: 170 chars — specific, keyword-rich with CTA
Target keyword: 'pendle finance' + 'yield tokenization' + 'PT YT pendle'
OpenGraph: article type with publishedTime/modifiedTime, custom OG image path set
Twitter card: summary_large_image configured
Canonical URL set via alternates
Structured data: Article schema + FAQPage schema (6 FAQ items) via generateArticleSchema + generateFAQSchema + combineSchemas
Breadcrumb component added (auto-generates BreadcrumbList JSON-LD)
Schemas added: Article, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList
Quantum guide — title: 'Quantum-Resistant Crypto: Protect Your Holdings 2026 | degen0x' (57 chars), keywords: quantum resistant crypto, post-quantum blockchain, Q-Day
Perp DEX guide — title: 'Best Perpetual DEXs 2026: Compare Hyperliquid, dYdX & More | degen0x' (66 chars), keywords: best perpetual DEX, perp DEX comparison
Both: Article + FAQPage structured data via combineSchemas(), OpenGraph article type, Twitter summary_large_image cards
Both: 5-6 internal links each to related tools and guides
Fixed critical bug: removed 'use client' from perp DEX page that would have broken Next.js metadata export

sections.title: Interactive Component
items: Built PendleYieldCalc.tsx — client component, zero external dependencies
Features: asset presets (stETH, sUSDS, eETH, Custom), investment amount, PT price input, underlying asset price, maturity date picker
Outputs: Fixed APY, return at maturity, profit, total return percentage
APY color-coding: green (≥8%), amber (≥4%), blue (<4%)
Quick scenario presets: Conservative / Balanced / Aggressive
Embedded in Section 9 (Getting Started) of the guide
TypeScript: clean (0 errors)

sections.title: Growth Opportunities Identified
items: Quantum-resistant crypto has extremely high search demand with relatively low competition — our comprehensive guide (549 lines, 14 min read) is well-positioned to capture early organic traffic
Perpetual DEX comparison is a high-intent keyword cluster — users searching for 'best perp DEX' are active traders with high engagement potential
Hyperliquid pmUSDH launch today provides a timely hook — same-day coverage signals authority and freshness to both users and Google
Solana×Mastercard partnership news pairs perfectly with our existing Alpenglow guide — cross-promotion opportunity
AI agents trend (Bybit launch, TRON foundation, Binance WotD theme) — potential content gap to fill next week
